English:
Library Manager for Venus 6 is a powerful desktop application for managing, versioning, importing, exporting, and packaging Hamilton VENUS liquid handling libraries.

Designed for laboratory automation professionals, it provides a complete solution for organizing HSL libraries used with Hamilton VENUS 6 software. Whether you work in a regulated GxP environment or an open research lab, Library Manager adapts to your workflow.

Key capabilities include:

• Import and export Hamilton VENUS HSL libraries with full version tracking
• Create and verify signed library packages (.hxlibpkg) for secure distribution
• Bundle multiple libraries into archive files (.hxlibarch) for bulk deployment
• Maintain a complete audit trail with automatic version history and rollback support
• Organize libraries into custom groups with drag-and-drop sorting
• Search and filter libraries by name, author, organization, or version
• Regulated Environment Mode enforces organization-level restrictions, password-protected settings, and integrity verification via SHA-256 hashing
• Full command-line interface (CLI) for scripting and CI/CD pipeline integration
• Dark mode support for comfortable extended use
• Built-in CHM help documentation

Library Manager for Venus 6 runs as a native Windows desktop application built on NW.js. It requires no internet connection and stores all data locally on your machine.

This tool is ideal for:
- Lab automation engineers managing Hamilton VENUS method libraries
- Quality teams enforcing library integrity in regulated environments
- System integrators packaging and distributing libraries across instruments

Version 1.4.8 includes security improvements, regulated mode enhancements, and numerous bug fixes.

Version 1.4.8 — Security and stability improvements: enhanced password hashing for regulated mode, fixed organization enforcement bypass, improved system library integrity verification, and over 10 bug fixes across import/export and CLI operations.
Import and export Hamilton VENUS HSL libraries with version tracking
Create signed library packages (.hxlibpkg) for secure distribution
Bundle libraries into archive files (.hxlibarch) for bulk deployment
Full version history with one-click rollback to any previous version
Regulated Environment Mode with organization-level access controls
SHA-256 integrity verification for system library protection
Custom library groups with drag-and-drop organization
Powerful search and filtering by name author or organization
Complete command-line interface (CLI) for automation and scripting
Dark mode for comfortable extended use
Works fully offline — no internet connection required
Complete audit trail for every library change
Binary container format for efficient library packaging
Manage, version, import, export, and package Hamilton VENUS 6 liquid handling libraries. Supports regulated environments, signed packages, version rollback, and CLI automation.
